title: Senior Software Engineer - Tech Mahindra Holdings Services - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Tech Mahindra Holdings Services - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Tech Mahindra Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Patna office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tech Mahindra Holdings Services:
Tech Mahindra Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tech Mahindra Holdings Services!
